detaileddescription.para: arbitrary 2x2 matrix Generated from class MR::Matrix2b.
arbitrary 2x2 matrix Generated from class MR::Matrix2i.
arbitrary 2x2 matrix Generated from class MR::Matrix2i64.
arbitrary 2x2 matrix Generated from class MR::Matrix2f.
arbitrary 2x2 matrix Generated from class MR::Matrix2d.

Constructs an array of empty (default-constructed) instances, of the specified size. Will never return null. The array must be destroyed using MR_FreeArray(). Use MR_Matrix2b_OffsetMutablePtr() and MR_Matrix2b_OffsetPtr() to access the array elements.

initializes matrix from its 2 rows Generated from constructor MR::Matrix2b::Matrix2b. Parameter x can not be null. It is a single object. The reference to the parameter x might be preserved in the constructed object. Parameter y can not be null. It is a single object. The reference to the parameter y might be preserved in the constructed object.
returns a matrix that scales uniformly Generated from method MR::Matrix2b::scale.
returns a matrix that has its own scale along each axis Generated from method MR::Matrix2b::scale.
Generated from method MR::Matrix2b::scale. Parameter s can not be null. It is a single object.
constructs a matrix from its 2 rows Generated from method MR::Matrix2b::fromRows. Parameter x can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter y can not be null. It is a single object.

constructs a matrix from its 2 columns; use this method to get the matrix that transforms basis vectors ( plusX, plusY ) into vectors ( x, y ) respectively Generated from method MR::Matrix2b::fromColumns. Parameter x can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter y can not be null. It is a single object.
row access Generated from method MR::Matrix2b::operator[]. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The returned pointer will never be null. It is non-owning, do NOT destroy it.

computes transposed matrix Generated from method MR::Matrix2b::transposed. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
